$comment: Known-flaky Playwright specs. Durable knowledge so a failure gets attributed to a known flake instead of re-diagnosed from memory each time. Consumed by scripts/flake-ledger.mjs (loader + isKnownFlake) and the CI failure-triage workflow. `match` is a case-insensitive substring of the test title; keep entries narrow. Removing an entry means 'we believe this is fixed' — do that deliberately.

flakes.reason: Hero-composer hydration depends on a rAF portal that starves under a headless render; fixed with a MutationObserver microtask (#502/#504) but can still flake on a cold render.
min-h-11 tap-target rect rounds sub-pixel below 44px on some DPRs; mitigated by min-h-12 but historically flaky.
Differentials narrow-viewport assertions race only under parallel workers; the suite runs workers:1 but sharded CI can still interleave.
The RAG answer-fallback path can exceed the 60s test timeout when the provider route is cold; a pre-existing advisory flake.
